chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Subscribe the channel and press on the bell icon so that you will not miss any updates.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Welcome back aliens.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: My name is Devin Reddy and in this video, we will talk about how do you access the previous

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: commands in IDLE.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now when you work on Python, you know, so we write a lot of code, right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Example, if I want to add two numbers or if I want to perform some operation like x equal

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: to 2 plus 4 plus 9.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now in this case, when you say hit enter and if you want to access the same command again,

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: can you do it?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now normally what happens is when you work on CMD, what we'd get is let's say if I perform

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: any operation here, example up, again, this is not a command in Windows, but let's try.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So when I say up and if I want to get the same command again, we just need to press

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: up arrow, right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So when you say up arrow, you will get this.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now, you know, when you work with IP config and you get this and again, if I want the

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: same command, you can say enter, just you just say up and enter, you get it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: That's not the case with IDLE.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: In this case, if you want to access that, we don't have by default option.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So what you have to do is you just need to go to options and then you have to click on

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: configure IDLE and here you need to click on keys.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now we need to find the history, right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So just scroll down to search for history.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So it is your history previous.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now by default, it will be, I guess, alt P in your machine because I've changed it in

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: my earlier session.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: If you want to change it, just click on that and select get new keys for selection and

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: here you can select the up arrow.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So you can see we have up arrow.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Click on OK and click on OK now.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So if you want to access the last element or last command, you just say up arrow and

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: you get the command.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now of course, when you are new to Python, you will not be knowing this but once you

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: start working on it, you will be needing this command a lot.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So this is how you find the previous command.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: I got some more questions, you know, after the video.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So let's say if you reach here and in Windows, we have this command, it is CLS.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So when you say CLS, it clears the command.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now that's not the case here, you know.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So that's not the case in IDLE.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: You cannot simply clear the screen.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Even if I try, we don't have anything here.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: I guess you can write some script which works on Python shell but that doesn't work in IDLE.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: The only way you can do that is by closing IDLE and reopen it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: OK.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Now if you have seen my videos, in my videos I have done that, you know.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So I was scrolling up but I was not scrolling in IDLE.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So it was an animation effect.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So when I was editing my video, I made sure that it goes up so that you can see those

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: things normally.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So the editing is done so that you can view it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So I have not scrolled on IDLE.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So as per my knowledge, it's not possible.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Maybe there might be some hidden script or some technique.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So if you know that, let me know in the comment section so that it will be helpful for everyone.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So that's it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: That's how you get the previous command and that's how you, that's the answer for your

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: question about how to clear the screen.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So that's it everyone.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Thank you for watching.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: I hope you are enjoying my series.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: Let me know in the comment section.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | IDLE Previous Command | Clear Screen？
chunks.text: So that's it.

chunks.text: Bye-bye.

In this case, if you want to access that, we don't have by default option. So what you have to do is you just need to go to options and then you have to click on configure IDLE and here you need to click on keys. Now we need to find the history, right?
